posts.title: How Cursor’s Composer 2.5 uses self-distillation to beat the frontier LLMs at coding
posts.summary: A deep look at the self-distillation techniques that make Composer 2.5 such a great coding model (and the hidden tradeoffs they introduce to AI reasoning). The post How Cursor’s Composer 2.5 uses self-distillation to beat the frontier LLMs at coding first appeared on TechTalks .
posts.author: Ben Dickson

posts.title: Harness, Scaffold, and the AI Agent Terms Worth Getting Right
OpenAI, Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL announce strategic content partnership
posts.summary: OpenAI partners with Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL to bring trusted Brazilian journalism to ChatGPT, expanding access to news with attribution and transparency.

posts.title: AI Weekly Issue #495: Musk, Zuckerberg killed Trump's AI safety order in three phone calls
posts.summary: Over the weekend: Musk, Zuckerberg, and Sacks killed Trump's draft AI safety executive order in three Wednesday-night phone calls. Anthropic closed a $30B+ round the same Saturday — while Microsoft quietly cancelled its internal Claude Code pilot after token billing ate the entire annual AI budget, redirecting developers to Copilot. CISA logged 15,000 attacks on a same-week Drupal SQL flaw. The first cross-registry supply chain attack — TrapDoor — hit npm, PyPI, and Crates.io at once, using .cursorrules and CLAUDE.md config files as the carrier. And the White House personally overrode the…
